title: Lead Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Manappuram Finance
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
